# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Reduce navbar clutter and make account actions easier to discover.

## Success Criteria

- Language selection is a single grouped dropdown instead of separate bubbles.
- A user/account bubble appears next to it.
- Logged-in users can access projects or sign out from the account menu.
- Logged-out users can sign in from the same account menu.

## UX Notes

- Keep the interactions clean and lightweight.
- Hover should work on desktop, but the button should still be clickable and understandable.
- Preserve the calm visual system already used across the app.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Hover interactions need to avoid feeling fragile or disappearing too easily.
